subcodes.first_line: In truth, the praise of these servants is not worthy of the Court of the Hidden Mystery, the Treasured Secret and the Guarded Symbol [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فی الحقیقه حمد این عباد لایق بساط غیب مکنون و سر مخزون و رمز مصون نبوده و
subcodes.subjects: @human soul as mirror; divine light, attributes within, @station of the Manifestation of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @wisdom [hikmat], @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment
